meta.title: Natural Skin Care SA by Norma Perry
meta.description: Natural Skin Care SA by Norma Perry offers appointment-only facial and skincare services with gentle, natural products.

hero.eyebrow: Natural Skin Care SA by Norma Perry
hero.body: Gentle, natural skincare experiences tailored to your monthly wellness routine and long-term skin goals.

about.heading: Natural Skin Care SA by Norma Perry
about.p1: Natural Skin Care SA by Norma Perry is rooted in gentle, personalized care using thoughtfully selected natural products. Every treatment is designed to support healthy skin function, calm sensitivity, and reveal a balanced, luminous complexion.
about.p2: Monthly skincare sessions help maintain progress, prevent buildup, and keep your skin looking refreshed all year long. Norma combines professional techniques with a relaxing spa atmosphere so each visit supports both skin health and stress relief.

services.heading: Services
services.intro: Explore customized skincare and wellness treatments designed for visible results and restorative self-care.
services.overview: Each facial includes deep cleansing, exfoliation, and gentle extractions to leave your skin smooth and clear. A revitalizing mask and light facial massage complete the experience, helping to restore and nourish your skin.

expressFacial.title: Express Facial
expressFacial.description: A focused refresh that deeply cleanses and revives your glow in under an hour.

deepCleansing.title: Deep Cleansing Facial
deepCleansing.description: A restorative treatment that clears congestion, hydrates skin, and supports healthy balance.

deluxeAntiAging.title: Deluxe Anti-Aging
deluxeAntiAging.description: A complete age-support ritual with layered hydration, lift, and skin-smoothing care.

goldAntiAging.title: Gold Anti-Aging Facial
goldAntiAging.description: A luxurious brightening treatment designed to improve firmness, texture, and radiance.

lamprobe.title: LamProbe
lamprobe.description: A precision treatment to target minor skin irregularities with comfort-focused care.

faceNeckMicrocurrent.title: Face Lifting & Neck Microcurrent
faceNeckMicrocurrent.description: Microcurrent stimulation for toned, lifted-looking skin across face and neck.

bodyMicrocurrentCupping.title: Microcurrent & Cupping Body Treatment
bodyMicrocurrentCupping.description: A body-focused session to support circulation, tone, and post-treatment relaxation.

reflexology.title: Reflexology
reflexology.description: A grounding foot treatment designed to ease stress and support whole-body wellness.

specials.heading: Specials
specials.intro: Specials are refreshed regularly based on seasonal skincare goals and appointment availability. Placeholder promotions are currently shown and will be replaced with Norma's current offers.

seasonalGlow.title: Seasonal Glow Special
seasonalGlow.details: Placeholder offer: Save on a Deep Cleansing Facial + brow wax combo this month.
seasonalGlow.cta: Contact Norma to confirm current pricing

newClient.title: New Client Welcome
newClient.details: Placeholder offer: First-time guests receive an add-on hydration boost.

wellnessReset.title: Wellness Reset Package
wellnessReset.details: Placeholder offer: Bundle reflexology with a facial treatment for total relaxation.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.appointments: Appointments are available by reservation only.
contact.emailListIntro: Get occasional updates on specials, seasonal treatments, and skincare tips.
contact.consent: I agree to receive occasional marketing emails about specials and studio news. I can unsubscribe anytime.
contact.success: You're on the list. Watch your inbox for specials and skincare tips.
